MOTION FOR LEAVE TO To File First Amended Complt
Off Calendar May-29-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Constantin V. Roboostoff, Esq. of Robbostoff & Kalkin, Tel. 415.732.0282, for plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted the tentative ruling which was not contested. PLAINTIFF EMER JOYCE'S Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint is granted, for good cause shown. Defendants have not demonstrated any prejudice in permitting Plaintiff leave to amend to add the allegations against Yellow Cab Company and Mr. Denner. Accordingly, the motion is granted. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
